articles.author: Tal Shalev
articles.title: In Orbán loss, Netanyahu sees his closest European ally defeated - CNN
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu saw his closest European ally soundly defeated in the Hungarian elections on Sunday.
articles.content:
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu saw his closest European ally soundly defeated in the Hungarian elections on Sunday.
The result is a blow to Israels longest-serving leader in an election y… [+3517 chars]
